The DDP-T415098B is an aftermarket piston and ring kit for the Perkins diesel 1106C and 1106D engine — OEM part number T415098B. This 0.5mm oversize kit is the right choice when a diesel engine rebuild requires oversized components after boring: it restores proper cylinder clearance and compression using the same dimensional specs as the original Perkins factory part.

This engine rebuild kit covers all cylinders in the 1106 series block — pistons and ring sets included. It works alongside compatible engine overhaul kits, head gasket sets, and bearing sets if you're doing a full strip-down. If you only need a motor overhaul kit for a single-engine job, this part ships as a complete rebuild kit — no sourcing multiple part numbers separately.

Delta Diesel Parts is a trusted US Perkins supply source for fleet workshops, agricultural dealers, and independent rebuilders handling Perkins engine repair. We stock the Perkins parts that keep your jobs moving — with most orders shipping the same day and expert support that reduces costly returns. Browse all Perkins diesel engine parts →

Confirm these specs match your engine before adding to cart. This rebuild kit is sold as a 0.5mm oversize — the most common oversize for Perkins 1106 engines after a first bore. If your engine has been bored 1.0mm over, a different Perkins parts number applies — contact us and we'll find the correct kit. If you're building a full motor overhaul kit order, see compatible gasket sets and bearings in the related products below.

OEM NumberT415098B
Part TypePiston & Ring Kit
SpecificationPT & PU — 0.5mm Oversize
OEM BrandPerkins
ConditionNew — Quality Aftermarket Diesel Part (OEM Replacement)
Compatible ModelsPerkins 1106C, 1106D

The 1106C and 1106D are workhorses of the Perkins diesel range — used in agricultural, construction, and industrial equipment worldwide. During a diesel engine rebuild, the bore size determines which oversize piston kit is needed. This kit — OEM reference T415098B — covers the 0.5mm oversize specification. Search by SKU or OEM number on this page to confirm your model before ordering. If your machine runs a different variant, contact our team with the engine serial number and we'll cross-reference the correct Perkins engine parts for your application.

Confirmed compatible Perkins diesel engine models:

1106C 1106D 1106C-E60TA 1106D-E70TA

Not sure? Contact our experts with your engine serial number and we'll confirm before you order.
